headline: U.S.-Iran Tensions, Inflation Data and Oracle Earnings Dominate Market Focus: Dow Jones, S&P, Nasdaq, Wall Street Futures
summary: U. S. equity futures traded lower on Wednesday as investors assessed renewed military action between the United States and Iran while awaiting a closely watched inflation report and quarterly results from software giant Oracle (NYSE:ORCL).

headline: Qualcomm Drops 6%, Arm Holdings Falls 5% as Mobile-Chip Stocks Slide in the Selloff
summary: Shares of Qualcomm (NASDAQ:QCOM) are down 6% to $193 and change in midday trading Wednesday, while Arm Holdings (NASDAQ:ARM) stock is off 5% to $309.75. The moves come as mobile and edge-compute chip names lag the broader semiconductor tape. The iShares Semiconductor ETF (NASDAQ:SOXX) is down by 2.3% on the session, signaling that the weakness ...
